SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-19-2021 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF DIEGO NAVARRETTE, ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPERTER, DANIEL NAVARRO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WILLIAM WALKER IS PRESENT. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. THE BREAKDOWN OF THE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT AT THE LAST HEARING IS DISCUSSED. DEFENDANT STATES THAT HIS INSURANCE COMPANY HAS STATED THAT THEY WILL NOT PAY THE AGREED TO AMOUNT DUE TO THE AMOUNT BEING MORE THAN THE ALLOWED DEDUCTIBLE OF $500.00. COURT RENDERS JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF FOR THE AGREED TO AMOUNT AT THE LAST HEARING OF $3,200.00 PLUS $40.00 IN COSTS = $3240.00. DEFENDANT IS INSTRUCTED TO TAKE THE JUDGMENT TO HIS INSURANCE COMPANY. NO EXHIBITS SUBMITTED FOR REVIEW. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, RECORD TRANSFERRED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-24-2021 - CONTINUED FOR INTERPRETER TO APR-19-2021 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. DISCLOSURE IS MADE. PLAINTIFF DIEGO NAVARRETE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WILLIAM WALKER IS PRESENT. MR. NAVARRETE REQUESTED AN INTERPRETER BUT THE COURT WAS UNABLE PROVIDE ONE. THE DEFENDANT STATED THAT THE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT BROKE DOWN AND THE PLAINTIFF SEEMED TO AGREE WITH HIM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT NAVARRETE, DIEGO RECOVER FROM APPELLANT WALKER, WILLIAM $2,700.00 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,740.00 NO EXHIBITS FILED NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-19-2020 - CONTINUED FOR INTERPRETER TO FEB-10-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF DIEGO NAVARRETE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WILLIAM WALKER IS PRESENT (ARRIVED 30MIN LATE). NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. COMMISSIONER: PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-10-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAR-24-2021 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. PLAINTIFF DIEGO NAVARRETE IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER DANIEL NAVARRO. DEFENDANT WILLIAM WALKER IS PRESENT. THE COURT HAS REVIEWED INSURANCE DOCUMENTS PERTAINING TO DEFENDANT WALKER AND DETERMINED DEFENDANT WALKER WAS A COVERED AND AN INSURED DRIVER UNDER THE POLICY AND THAT THE POLICY WAS VALID ON THE DATE OF THE FEBRUARY 3, 2020 ACCIDENT FROM JANUARY 25, 2020 TO FEBRUARY 25, 2020. THE AMOUNT OF PROPERTY DAMAGES ASSESSED IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF NAVARETTE IS $3200.00 PLUS $40.00 IN COURT COST FOR A TOTAL OF $3240.00. THE COURT ORDERS DEFENDANT WALKER TO CONTACT HIS INSURANCE COMPANY AND PRESENT THIS ORDER TO THEM TO TAKE RESPONSIBILITY FOR THE AWARD. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MISCELLANEOUS CIVIL SPECIAL SETTING CALENDAR OF JUN-24-2021 - ASSIGNED TO SMALL CLAIM APPEALS ON JUN-24-2021 AT 9:15 AM IN DEPT. 306, JUDGE RICHARD ULMER. (206)
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,700.00 FILED BY NAVARRETE, DIEGO AS TO DEFENDANT WALKER, WILLIAM ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-08-2020 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NAVARRETE, DIEGO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WALKER, WILLIAM $3,200.00 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,240.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jun-24-2021 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff/Respondent Diego Navarrete appeared on his own behalf, assisted by Spanish interpreter Patrice Binaisa.
Defendant/Appellant William Walker appeared on his own behalf.
This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo.
Plaintiff/Respondent Diego Navarrete testified on his own behalf, assisted by Spanish interpreter Patrice Binaisa.
Defendant/Appellant William Walker testified on his own behalf.
The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Plaintiff/Respondent's Group Exhibit 1: photos
Defendant/Appellant does not submit any exhibits.
Exhibits are returned to the submitting party.
The matter is taken under submission.
Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk: J. Bertelsen; Not reported. (306)
